# Zumly

> JavaScript library for hierarchical zoom navigation (ZUI). Navigate in Z (depth) through discrete views in the XY plane with spatial transitions.

## What it is

Zumly is a structured, trigger-driven zoom user interface engine. Users zoom into focused elements to open the next view — attention (focus) and depth (Z) stay aligned with layout (XY). It is NOT a freeform pan/zoom canvas or map library.

- Framework-agnostic: works with React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, or plain HTML
- Pluggable transition drivers: CSS, WAAPI, Anime.js, GSAP, Motion, none, or custom
- Plugin system with hash router included
- Touch, keyboard, mouse, and wheel input support

## Key concepts

- **Canvas**: Container element with class `zumly-canvas` where views render
- **View**: A DOM subtree with root class `z-view`. Sources: HTML strings, URLs, async functions, objects with `render()`, web components
- **Trigger**: Element with class `zoom-me` and `data-to="viewName"` that initiates zoom-in
- **Depth navigation**: Zoom in/out through view hierarchy (Z axis)
- **Lateral navigation**: Navigate between sibling views at the same depth level
- **Driver**: Pluggable animation engine for transitions
- **Plugin**: Object with `install(instance, options)` or plain function

## Quick start

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/zumly/dist/zumly.css">
<script src="https://unpkg.com/zumly/dist/zumly.js"></script>
<div class="zumly-canvas" id="app"></div>
<script>
  const app = new Zumly({
    mount: '#app',
    initialView: 'home',
    views: {
      home: '<div class="z-view"><div class="zoom-me" data-to="detail">Open</div></div>',
      detail: '<div class="z-view"><p>Detail view</p></div>'
    }
  });
  app.init();
</script>
```

## Links

- Live demo: https://zumerlab.github.io/zumly/
- GitHub: https://github.com/zumerlab/zumly
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/zumly
- Full LLM reference: https://zumerlab.github.io/zumly/llms-full.txt
- API docs: https://zumerlab.github.io/zumly/ (zoom into API card)
- Driver API: https://github.com/zumerlab/zumly/blob/main/docs/DRIVER_API.md
- TypeScript types: https://github.com/zumerlab/zumly/blob/main/types/zumly.d.ts

## Ecosystem

- [Orbit CSS](https://github.com/zumerlab/orbit) — Radial/orbital CSS layout system, pairs well with Zumly
- [SnapDOM](https://github.com/zumerlab/snapdom) — Lightweight DOM diffing library
